meta.tercile_rule: long top n//3 by score, short bottom n//3, equal-weight dollar-neutral; short uses MEAN
meta.WARNING: EXPLORATORY ONLY. 18 days, 5d overlap -> effective indep obs ~3-4. No statistical power. Mechanism direction at best.

robustness_combined_score.note: Leave-one-day-out on NET TOTAL LS (overlap). f1 sign FLIPS when 2026-06-01 removed (-0.39 vs +0.47). f5 swings 2.83..5.17. Signal is single-day/single-name driven.
robustness_combined_score.why_combined_eq_tech: 97.5% of long-tercile slots are tech_score==1.0 (ceiling), so combined_score LS ~ tech_score LS numerically.
